contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 40
- Description: dao_protocol PR5a: RSA signature verifier (port of SignatureVerifier) + PR5b/c spec
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/37
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/196
  
  Details:
  PR5a of the Edgar to dao_protocol extraction (the crown jewel, sliced). Ported Rails SignatureVerifier to server/crypto/verify.py: parses the signed payload (event body + separator + public key + RSASSA-PKCS1-v1_5/SHA-256 signature), reconstructs the signed message, and verifies with the cryptography library (the inverse of edgar_client.py signing). Validated against the real known-good example payload — verifies True, proving byte-exact message reconstruction; tampered fails cleanly; malformed/bad-key raises. 5 tests (22 total). Also mapped and recorded the complete PR5b (intake: verify + Request-Transaction-ID dedup + Telegram Chat Logs append + governor authority) and PR5c (dispatch: WebhookTriggerWorker port + the 15 event-tag to GAS-webhook+action routing table replicating the Sidekiq business logic) into the execution roadmap as a turnkey resumable unit. These write the real ledger and hit real GAS, so they will be built gate-off with mocked tests and live-tested operator-driven per policy.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 66.67
